task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenMRS Concept Dictionary or 'Add Concept' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS web interface is visible, showing the 'Concept Dictionary', 'Add Concept', or 'Create Concept' page.
A text input field for the concept name (Fully Specified Name) contains exactly 'Toluene Exposure'.
A text input field for synonyms contains exactly 'Methylbenzene exp'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Class and Datatype.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Class' dropdown or selection shows 'Diagnosis' and the 'Datatype' dropdown shows 'N/A'.
A text area for the description contains 'Occupational exposure to toluene solvent'.

task_completion.description: Save the concept and ensure it is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Concept saved successfully') is visible, or the saved concept details page is shown with the entered information and no indication of being retired or inactive.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible showing the OpenMRS application, rather than a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the task in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual OpenMRS web forms, not a text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the concept.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of clicking a 'Save' button or a resulting success page, rather than just filling out the form and stopping.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Fully Specified Name is 'Toluene Exposure', the expected synonym is 'Methylbenzene exp', the expected concept class is 'Diagnosis', and the expected datatype is 'N/A'. The description must contain 'Occupational exposure' (ideally 'Occupational exposure to toluene solvent').
